subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — we'd be happy to explore a collaboration. I can propose a few options for an introductory call: 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. If none of those work, feel free to suggest alternatives and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact directory details or direct phone lines, but you can use the public website to find the right public contact route for your team.

Best,
[Your Name]
